chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الرَّجُلِ يَطُوفُ فَتَعْرِضُ لَهُ الْحَاجَةُ أَوِ الْعِلَّةُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 129 – The man performs Tawaaf, so a need presents itself to him, or an illness

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/34)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/34)
text: إِذَا طَافَ الرَّجُلُ بِالْبَيْتِ أَشْوَاطاً ثُمَّ اشْتَكَى أَعَادَ الطَّوَافَ يَعْنِي الْفَرِيضَةَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘When the man performs Tawaaf by the House, a few circuits, then complains, should repeat the Tawaaf, meaning the Obligatory one’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, Tf one performs a few times Tawaf and then something happens, he must do his Tawaf again - if it is an obligatory Tawaf.’”
